details: The scheme "Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards (Non-Commercial)" was launched by the Tiatr Academy under the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Government of Goa. The scheme aims to recognize and honor non-commercial artistes who have contributed immensely for the development of tiatr, its song and music through yearly Tiatr Festivals/Competitions organized by Kala Academy and by organizing tiatrs in villages, as well as artistes who have enriched Konkani Tiatr and Konkani Song through All India Radio, Doordarshan and other media platforms. The scheme provides lifetime recognition awards consisting of a shawl, a memento, a citation, and a cash burse as fixed by Tiatr Academy of Goa, with special consideration given to excellence in acting, script writing, directing, singing, lyric writing, set designing, and innovative contributions to the tiatr stage.
benefits: The Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Award (Non-Commercial) consists of a shawl, a memento, a citation, and a Cash Burse as fixed by Tiatr Academy of Goa
Recognition and honor at a special function on 2nd January on the occasion of the birth anniversary of Lucasinho Ribeiro the 'Pioneer of Tiatr'
Lifetime achievement recognition for contribution to tiatr field
Awards are conferred annually with not more than 5 artistes receiving the award each year.
Awards are presented at a special function on 2nd January.
eligibility: The applicant should be not less than 60 years of age.
The applicant should have at least 10 years contribution in the field of tiatr.
The applicant should demonstrate excellence as an actor, script writer, director, singer, lyricist, set designer, or other relevant role.
The applicant should have performed in at least 10 tiatrs if working as actor/singer/stage manager/lights provider/make-up artist/costume designer/live music/background music.
The applicant should have written/directed at least 10 tiatrs if working as a writer/director.
The age limit of 60 years may be relaxed if the health of the artiste is not well.
*The selected artistes will have to be compulsorily present in person to receive the award.
*Tiatr Academy of Goa will confer Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards only once in a lifetime be it in Tiatr (Commercial/Non-Commercial) or Khell or Khell-Tiatr or Konkani Cinema.

offline: (This scheme operates through a recommendation system rather than direct individual applications)

Individuals or institutions can recommend deserving artistes by submitting the recommendation form along with complete nominee details. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed recommendation form along with the documents to -
Tiatr Academy of Goa, AS-1 / AS-4, Block A, 2nd Floor, Campal Trade Centre, Opposite Kala Academy, Campal, Panaji, Goa, India – 403001
The Executive Board of Tiatr Academy of Goa may also select deserving artistes from outside the recommended list through their own assessment and advertisements in local newspapers.

Selection is done based on established criteria considering years of service, excellence in specific roles, awards received, innovations on tiatr stage, recorded works, contributions to other language dramas or films, published materials, minimum 10 years contribution, and specific performance requirements based on role.

The Tiatr Academy of Goa Executive Board reviews all recommendations and makes final selections based on the established criteria, with successful candidates being notified for the award ceremony attendance.

documents_required: Additional Documents/Evidence supporting contribution to tiatr
List of tiatrs with specific contribution details as per role
Documentation of published books (if applicable for script writers/lyricists)
Evidence of recordings on vinyl records, Cassettes, CDs, DVDs, digital media or broadcast on All India Radio/Doordarshan/TV Channels (if applicable for singers/musicians)

faqs.question: What is the minimum number of years I need to have contributed to tiatr to be considered for recognition?
faqs.answer: You must have contributed to the field of tiatr for at least 10 years to be eligible for consideration.

faqs.question: Can I apply directly for this recognition, or do I need someone else to recommend me?
faqs.answer: You cannot apply directly. The selection process works through recommendations from individuals or institutions, though the Executive Board may also select deserving artistes independently.

faqs.question: What happens if I have already received a similar recognition in commercial tiatr or other Konkani performing arts?
faqs.answer: You will not be eligible for this award if you have already received Lifetime Contribution to Tiatr Awards in any category including Commercial/Non-Commercial, Khell, Khell-Tiatr, or Konkani Cinema.

faqs.question: If I am a script writer or director, how many productions must I have completed to qualify?
faqs.answer: As a writer or director, you must have written or directed at least 10 tiatrs respectively to meet the eligibility requirements.

faqs.question: What is the specific age requirement for eligibility, and are there any exceptions to this rule?
faqs.answer: You must be not less than 60 years of age, though this age limit may be relaxed if your health condition is not well.

faqs.question: How many artistes can receive this recognition in a single year, and is there any guarantee of selection?
faqs.answer: Not more than 5 artistes from the field will be conferred with these awards every year, and selection is not guaranteed.

faqs.question: What types of contributions beyond acting and directing are considered for evaluation purposes?
faqs.answer: Contributions as singer, lyricist, set designer, script writer, musician, stage manager, lights provider, make-up artist, costume designer, live music provider, and background music designer are all considered.

faqs.question: Is there any flexibility in the rules governing this recognition system that could affect my application?
faqs.answer: Yes, Tiatr Academy of Goa reserves the right to make any changes in the rules governing this recognition system.

faqs.question: What specific evidence should I provide if I have worked as a singer or musician in tiatr productions?
faqs.answer: You should provide details of songs recorded on vinyl records, Cassettes, Compact Discs, Digital Versatile Discs, digital media, or broadcast on All India Radio/Doordarshan/Television Channels.

faqs.question: If I am primarily an actor or performer, what is the minimum number of productions I must have participated in?
faqs.answer: If you work as an actor, singer, stage manager, lights provider, make-up artist, costume designer, live music provider, or background music provider, you must have performed in at least 10 tiatrs.

faqs.question: When and where will I receive the recognition if selected, and is my personal attendance mandatory?
faqs.answer: You must be compulsorily present in person to receive the award at a special function on 2nd January on the occasion of the birth anniversary of Lucasinho Ribeiro.

faqs.question: What physical items and recognition will I receive as part of this lifetime achievement acknowledgment?
faqs.answer: The recognition consists of a shawl, a memento, a citation, and a Cash Burse as fixed by Tiatr Academy of Goa.

faqs.question: Besides my tiatr work, will my contributions to films or dramas in other languages be considered during evaluation?
faqs.answer: Yes, your work in acting, directing, singing, composing music, composing lyrics, designing sets, designing background music, or designing light effects for dramas in other languages or films will be considered.

faqs.question: What additional qualifications or achievements might strengthen my candidacy beyond the basic requirements?
faqs.answer: Having received awards in your field, published books of scripts or lyrics, demonstrated innovation on the tiatr stage, and having a distinguished record as an excellent performer in your specific role will strengthen your candidacy.
